To identify the code which triggers this warning, call 'ConfigureWarnings(w => w.Throw(SqlServerEventId.SavepointsDisabledBecauseOfMARS))'.

INFO  2026-05-12 17:01:47,313 [1    ] oft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command - Executed DbCommand (234ms) [Parameters=[@__language_Name_1='?' (Size = 128)], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [AbpLanguages] AS [a]
        WHERE [a].[TenantId] IS NULL AND [a].[Name] = @__language_Name_1) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)

WHERE (@__ef_filter__p_0 = CAST(1 AS bit) OR [a].[TenantId] IS NULL) AND [a].[Source] = @___sourceName_0 AND [a].[LanguageName] = @__CultureInfo_Name_1
